title: Tri-Valor Ultra Realism
description: ​A high-fidelity 512x512 resource pack designed for advanced lighting and realistic material depth.
body:
# Tri-Valor Ultra Realism (512x512)

Transform Minecraft into a high-fidelity visual experience. **Tri-Valor Ultra Realism** completely overhauls the game's blocks with razor-sharp 512x512 textures, rich organic details, and built-in physical material maps.

### 🌿 High-Fidelity Textures
* **True 512×512 Detail:** Experience hyper-detailed surfaces, from the jagged crevices of volcanic rock to the intricate, organic grain of natural cobblestone and wood.
* **Physically Based Rendering (PBR):** Built-in material mapping means iron, gold, and copper blocks reflect light like real cold metal, while damp surfaces feature a distinct physical sheen.
* **Seamless Natural Environments:** Designed to break the rigid "grid" look of Minecraft, allowing moss, dirt, and foliage to blend smoothly into one another.

---

## ⚠️ SHADER REQUIRED FOR 3D DEPTH
Because this pack utilizes advanced Parallax Occlusion Mapping (POM) and PBR textures, **standard vanilla lighting will look flat.** You need a shader engine to process the 3D depth and reflections.

For the intended color palette and perfect visual sync, download our officially paired shader:

👉 **[DOWNLOAD TRI VALOR REALISTIC SHADER](https://modrinth.com/shader/tri-valor-realistic-shader)** 👈
